narrative:
Union Township has 4,430 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
